name: BDSM Chamber
description: Soundproof room with various restraints and equipment. Surprisingly good for stress relief and group bonding exercises.

name: Hydroponics Bay
description: Advanced plant cultivation system for sustainable food production. Essential for long-term survival.

name: Armory
description: Secure weapons storage and maintenance facility. Contains firearms, ammunition, and tactical equipment.

name: Server Room
description: Climate-controlled data center housing main computer systems. Critical for communications and bunker operations.

name: Medical Bay
description: Full surgical suite with diagnostic equipment and pharmacy supplies. Can handle most medical emergencies.

name: Engineering Workshop
description: Fully equipped machine shop with tools, 3D printers, and spare parts. Essential for repairs and manufacturing.

name: Fitness Center
description: Exercise equipment and training space. Helps maintain physical and mental health during confinement.

name: Archive Library
description: Digital and physical knowledge repository. Contains crucial survival manuals and entertainment.

name: Recycling Plant
description: Waste processing and material recovery systems. Converts waste into usable resources.

name: Observation Deck
description: Periscope and sensor array for monitoring surface conditions. Your only window to the outside world.
